en: And it's a long day, living in Reseda, there's a freeway, running through the yard,
ja: 庭を走り抜ける高速道路がある
zhTW: 有一條高速公路穿過院子
vi: Co mot con duong cao toc chay qua san

en: and I'm a bad boy, cause I don't even miss her, I'm a bad boy for breaking her heart.
ko: 난 나쁜 남자야, 그녀를 그리워하지도 않으니까
ja: 俺は悪いやつだ、彼女を恋しくも思わないから
zhTW: 我是個壞男孩，因為我根本不想她
vi: Va toi la ke xau, vi toi con chang nho co ay

en: And I'm free, free falling, yeah I'm free, free falling.
ja: そう、俺は自由だ、自由落下
zhTW: 是的，我自由了，自由墜落
vi: Dung, toi tu do, tu do roi xuong

en: And all the vampires, walking through the valley, move west, down Ventura Boulevard.
